associatedMedia.headline: Eilean Donan Castle, Donan, Argyll, Scotland
associatedMedia.description: Eilean Donan Castle is a small tidal island where three sea lochs meet Loch Duich, Loch Long, and Loch Alsh, Highlands, Scotand. https://pin.it/43Fh9OT

associatedMedia.headline: Eilean Donan Castle, Donan, Isle of Skye, Scotland
associatedMedia.description:
History
The name Eilean Donan, or island of Donan, is most probably called after the 6th century Irish Saint, Bishop Donan who came to Scotland around 580 AD. There are several churches dedicated to Donan in the area and it is likely that he formed a small cell or community on the island during the late 7th century.

associatedMedia.headline: WHY IS IT THAT MY HEART STIRS WHEN I HEAR BAGPIPES?

zh.Inverness, Inverness-shire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭音巴內-爾音巴內斯
zh.Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭可洛馬迪夏爾可洛馬迪
zh.lifeSummary: 當Kenneth MacKenzie 3rd Laird of Kintail於1300年出生在蘇格蘭洛-爾金泰爾時，他的父親Iain John MacKenzie 2nd Laird of Kintail30歲，母親Margaret de Strathbogie26歲。他於大約1339年與Fynvola MacLeod在蘇格蘭洛-爾金泰爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1346年在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾音巴內斯享年46歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.Inverness, Inverness-shire, Scotland: 苏格兰音巴內-爾音巴內斯
zh-hans.Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland: 苏格兰可洛馬迪夏爾可洛馬迪
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Kenneth MacKenzie 3rd Laird of Kintail于1300年出生在苏格兰洛-爾金泰爾时，他的父亲Iain John MacKenzie 2nd Laird of Kintail30岁，母亲Margaret de Strathbogie26岁。他于大约1339年与Fynvola MacLeod在苏格兰洛-爾金泰爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1346年在苏格兰音巴內-爾音巴內斯享年46岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: MacKenzie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Kinsey
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Kynsey (Old English Cynesige from cyne- ‘royal’ + sige ‘victory’).
Possibly also an Americanized form of Swiss German Künzi (see Kuenzi ).

History: The paternal grandfather of NJ and PA legislator John Kinsey (1693–1750) was one of the commissioners sent out from England in 1677 by the West Jersey proprietors to buy land from the Indians and to lay out a town. John was the leader of the Quaker party in the PA assembly and chief justice of the PA supreme court.

variants.name: McKenzie
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Coinnich, a patronymic from the personal name Coinneach meaning ‘comely’, Anglicized as Kenneth. Compare the Irish form McKinney 2. The Scottish spelling with -z- indicates palatalization of the -n- (compare Menzies ).

History: This is the name of a Scottish Highland clan, historically associated with the mountainous district of Kintail in nortwestern Scotland, with Cromarty, and with Loch Seaforth (Loch Shiphoirt) on the Island of Harris.

nameMeanings.name: Kenneth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Scottish origin: Anglicized form of two different Gaelic names, Cinaed and Cainnech. The former was the Gaelic name of Kenneth mac Alpin ( d. 858 ), first king of the united Picts and Scots. The latter survives today in Scotland as the common Gaelic name Coinneach . Since early in the 20th century Kenneth has been in regular use and enjoyed great popularity as a given name well beyond the borders of Scotland.

variants.name: Kennith
meanings: Of Scottish origin: Anglicized form of two different Gaelic names, Cinaed and Cainnech. The former was the Gaelic name of Kenneth mac Alpin ( d. 858 ), first king of the united Picts and Scots. The latter survives today in Scotland as the common Gaelic name Coinneach . Since early in the 20th century Kenneth has been in regular use and enjoyed great popularity as a given name well beyond the borders of Scotland.

en.lifeSummary: When Kenneth MacKenzie 3rd Laird of Kintail was born in 1300, in Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland, his father, Iain John MacKenzie 2nd Laird of Kintail, was 30 and his mother, Margaret de Strathbogie, was 26. He married Fynvola MacLeod about 1339, in Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1346, in Inverness, Inverness-shire, Scotland, at the age of 46, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Kenneth MacKenzie 3rd Laird of Kintail est né en 1300, à Kintail, Ross-shire, Écosse, son père, Iain John MacKenzie 2nd Laird of Kintail, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Strathbogie, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Fynvola MacLeod environ 1339, à Kintail, Ross-shire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1346, à Inverness, Inverness-shire, Écosse, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Kenneth MacKenzie 3rd Laird of Kintail 1300 in Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Iain John MacKenzie 2nd Laird of Kintail 30 und seine Mutter Margaret de Strathbogie 26. Er hat um 1339 in Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland Fynvola MacLeod geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1346 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Inverness, Inverness-shire, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Kenneth MacKenzie 3rd Laird of Kintail è nato il nel 1300 nel Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland, il suo padre, Iain John MacKenzie 2nd Laird of Kintail, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Strathbogie, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Fynvola MacLeod circa 1339, nel Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1346, nel Inverness, Inverness-shire, Scotland, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Kenneth MacKenzie 3rd Laird of Kintailが1300年にスコットランドロス-シュアイアキンティイルで生まれた時，父Iain John MacKenzie 2nd Laird of Kintailは30歳，母Margaret de Strathbogieは26歳であった。約1339年にスコットランドロス-シュアイアキンティイルでFynvola MacLeodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1346年にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアインバーネスで46歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Kenneth MacKenzie 3rd Laird of Kintail(이)가 1300년 스컷랜드 로스-실르 킨테일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Iain John MacKenzie 2nd Laird of Kintail(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Strathbogie(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1339년 스컷랜드 로스-실르 킨테일에서 Fynvola MacLeod(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1346년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 인버네스에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Kenneth MacKenzie 3rd Laird of Kintail nasceu em 1300, em Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland, seu pai, Iain John MacKenzie 2nd Laird of Kintail, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Strathbogie, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Fynvola MacLeod aproximadamente 1339, em Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1346, em Inverness, Inverness-shire, Scotland, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Kenneth MacKenzie 3rd Laird of Kintail родился в 1300 г. в местности кинтеил, росс-шир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Iain John MacKenzie 2nd Laird of Kintail было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Strathbogie, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Fynvola MacLeod около 1339 г. в местности кинтеил, росс-шир, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1346 г. в местности инвирнесс, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Kenneth MacKenzie 3rd Laird of Kintail nació en 1300, en Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland, su papá, Iain John MacKenzie 2nd Laird of Kintail, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Margaret de Strathbogie, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Fynvola MacLeod aproximadamente 1339, en Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1346, en Inverness, Inverness-shire, Scotland, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
